div.p: This case-insensitive code system http://smart.who.int/base/CodeSystem/CDHIv2 defines the following codes:

tr.td: Transmit health event alerts to specific population group(s)
Transmit targeted health information to person(s) based on health status or demographics
Transmit targeted alerts and reminders to person(s)
Transmit diagnostics result, or availability of result, to person(s)
Transmit untargeted health information to an undefined population
Transmit untargeted health event alerts to undefined group
Access by the individual to own medical or summary health records
Self monitoring of health or diagnostic data by the individual
Active data capture/documentation by an individual
Access by the individual to verifiable documentation of a health event or health status
Reporting of health system feedback by persons
Reporting of public health events by persons
Look-up of information on health and health services by individuals
Transmit or manage out-of-pocket payments by individuals
Transmit or manage vouchers to individuals for health services
Transmit or manage incentives to individuals for health services
Manage provision and withdrawal of consent by individuals
Enrol person(s) for health services/clinical care plan
Longitudinal tracking of person's health status and services
Manage person-centred unstructured clinical records (e.g. notes, images, documents)
Routine health indicator data collection and management
Provide prompts and alerts based according to protocol
Screen persons by risk or other health status
Consultations between remote person and healthcare provider
Remote monitoring of person's health or diagnostic data by provider
Transmission of medical data (e.g. images, notes, and videos) to healthcare provider
Consultations for case management between healthcare providers
Communication from healthcare provider to supervisor(s)
Communication and performance feedback to healthcare provider(s)
Transmit routine news and workflow notifications to healthcare provider(s)
Transmit non-routine health event alerts to healthcare provider(s)
Generative AI for tailored content creation
Manage referrals between points of service within health sector
Manage referrals between health and other sectors (social services, police, justice, economic support schemes)
Scheduling and activity planning for healthcare providers
Identify persons in need of services
Provide training content to healthcare provider(s)
Transmit person's diagnostic result to healthcare provider
Capture diagnostic results from digital devices
Verify individual's health coverage and financing scheme membership
List health workforce cadres and related identification information
Record training credentials of healthcare provider(s)
Manage inventory and distribution of health commodities
Notify stock levels of health commodities
Register licensed drugs and health commodities
Report counterfeit or substandard drugs by persons
Notification of public health events from point of diagnosis
Notify, register and certify birth event
Notify, register and certify death event
Register and verify health coverage scheme membership of persons
Track and manage insurance billing and claims processes
Transmit and manage payments to health facilities
Transmit and manage routine payroll payment to healthcare provider(s)
Transmit or manage financial incentives to healthcare provider(s)
Manage and plan budget allocations, revenue and expenditures
Determine level of subsidies for health coverage schemes
Monitor status and maintenance of health equipment
Track regulation and licensing of medical equipment
List health facilities and related information
Register and store current health certificate information
Retrieve and validate current health certificate information
Automated analysis of data to generate new information or predictions on future events
Parse unstructured data into structured data
Merge, de-duplicate and curate coded datasets or terminologies
Classify disease codes or cause of mortality
Map location of health facilities/structures and households
Map location of persons and settlements
Map health and health indicator data to geographic data

title.value: Classification of Digital Health Interventions v2

description.value:
CodeSystem for the Classification of Digital Interventions, Services and Applications in Health (CDISAH), second edition (2023). ISBN 978-92-4-008194-9.
Organised into four groups based on the primary user: 1. Persons 2. Healthcare providers 3. Health management and support personnel 4. Data services
New categories vs v1: 1.4.4, 1.6.2, 1.8, 2.5.6, 2.11, 3.1.5, 3.5.7, 3.5.8, 3.8, 4.3.5, 4.4.2, 4.4.3, 4.5. See ConceptMap CDHIv1toCDHIv2 for the full mapping from the first edition.

copyright.value: WHO © 2023. Some rights reserved. CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO.

display.value: Targeted communication to Persons
Transmit health event alerts to specific population group(s)
Transmit targeted health information to person(s) based on health status or demographics
Transmit targeted alerts and reminders to person(s)
Transmit diagnostics result, or availability of result, to person(s)
Untargeted communication to Persons
Transmit untargeted health information to an undefined population
Transmit untargeted health event alerts to undefined group
Person to Person communication
Peer group for individuals
Personal health tracking
Access by the individual to own medical or summary health records
Self monitoring of health or diagnostic data by the individual
Active data capture/documentation by an individual
Access by the individual to verifiable documentation of a health event or health status
Person based reporting
Reporting of health system feedback by persons
Reporting of public health events by persons
On demand communication with persons
Look-up of information on health and health services by individuals
Simulated human-like conversations with individual(s)
Person-centred financial transactions
Transmit or manage out-of-pocket payments by individuals
Transmit or manage vouchers to individuals for health services
Transmit or manage incentives to individuals for health services
Person-centred consent management
Manage provision and withdrawal of consent by individuals
Healthcare providers
Identification and registration of persons
Verify a person's unique identity
Enrol person(s) for health services/clinical care plan
Person-centred health records
Longitudinal tracking of person's health status and services
Manage person-centred structured clinical records
Manage person-centred unstructured clinical records (e.g. notes, images, documents)
Routine health indicator data collection and management
Healthcare provider decision support
Provide prompts and alerts based according to protocol
Provide checklist according to protocol
Screen persons by risk or other health status
Consultations between remote person and healthcare provider
Remote monitoring of person's health or diagnostic data by provider
Transmission of medical data (e.g. images, notes, and videos) to healthcare provider
Consultations for case management between healthcare providers
Healthcare provider communication
Communication from healthcare provider to supervisor(s)
Communication and performance feedback to healthcare provider(s)
Transmit routine news and workflow notifications to healthcare provider(s)
Transmit non-routine health event alerts to healthcare provider(s)
Peer group for healthcare providers
Generative AI for tailored content creation
Referral coordination
Coordinate emergency response and transport
Manage referrals between points of service within health sector
Manage referrals between health and other sectors (social services, police, justice, economic support schemes)
Scheduling and activity planning for healthcare providers
Identify persons in need of services
Schedule healthcare provider's activities
Healthcare provider training
Provide training content to healthcare provider(s)
Assess capacity of healthcare provider(s)
Prescription and medication management
Transmit or track prescription orders
Track individual's medication consumption
Report adverse drug effects
Laboratory and diagnostics imaging management
Transmit person's diagnostic result to healthcare provider
Transmit and track diagnostic orders
Capture diagnostic results from digital devices
Track biological specimens
Healthcare provider financial transactions
Verify individual's health coverage and financing scheme membership
Receive payments from individuals
Health management and support personnel
Human resource management
List health workforce cadres and related identification information
Monitor performance of healthcare provider(s)
Manage registration/certification of healthcare provider(s)
Record training credentials of healthcare provider(s)
Manage health workforce activities
Supply chain management
Manage inventory and distribution of health commodities
Notify stock levels of health commodities
Monitor cold-chain sensitive commodities
Register licensed drugs and health commodities
Manage procurement of commodities
Report counterfeit or substandard drugs by persons
Public health event notification
Notification of public health events from point of diagnosis
Civil Registration and Vital Statistics (CRVS)
Notify, register and certify birth event
Notify, register and certify death event
Health system financial management
Register and verify health coverage scheme membership of persons
Track and manage insurance billing and claims processes
Transmit and manage payments to health facilities
Transmit and manage routine payroll payment to healthcare provider(s)
Transmit or manage financial incentives to healthcare provider(s)
Manage and plan budget allocations, revenue and expenditures
Determine level of subsidies for health coverage schemes
Collect health insurance contributions
Equipment and asset management
Monitor status and maintenance of health equipment
Track regulation and licensing of medical equipment
Facility management
List health facilities and related information
Assess health facilities
Person-centred health certificate management
Register and store current health certificate information
Retrieve and validate current health certificate information
Revoke and update health certificate
Data services
Data Management
Form creation for data acquisition
Data storage and aggregation
Data synthesis and visualizations
Automated analysis of data to generate new information or predictions on future events
Data coding
Parse unstructured data into structured data
Merge, de-duplicate and curate coded datasets or terminologies
Classify disease codes or cause of mortality
Geospatial information management
Map location of health facilities/structures and households
Map location of health event
Map location of persons and settlements
Map location of healthcare provider(s)
Map health and health indicator data to geographic data
Data exchange and interoperability
Point-to-point data integration
Standards-compliant interoperability
Message routing
Data governance compliance
Authentication and authorisation
Data privacy protection
Data consent and provenance
Trust architecture
